app.title: RescueMind AI
locale.label: English
app.subtitle: Barangay Disaster & Complaint Triage
landing.title: Barangay Triage System
landing.subtitle: AI-powered system for fast and accurate routing of disaster and complaint reports to the right government agency.
landing.featuresDesc: Designed for modern barangay governance with AI and offline capability.
landing.categoriesDesc: Supports all common barangay report types.
landing.testimonialsDesc: Feedback from our users across different barangays.
landing.ctaDesc: Start reporting incidents in your barangay. Free and easy to use.
form.title: Report an Incident
form.description: Describe the incident or complaint in your barangay.
form.placeholder: Example: Strong flood at the corner of Mabini St. and Rizal Ave., waist-deep water, need rescue.
form.error.minLength: Please provide a more detailed description (at least 10 characters).
form.tip: Tip: Press Ctrl + Enter to submit quickly.
form.locationFailed: Could not detect location. Select manually below.
loading.title: Analyzing report...
result.humanReview: Needs manual review - low confidence score.
disclaimer.text: This result is AI-assisted classification only. Final action and routing are the responsibility of the barangay.
offline.title: Offline Mode
dashboard.title: Report Dashboard
error.generic: An error occurred while processing your report. Please try again.
error.network: No connection to server. Please try again.
auth.passwordHint: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.successMsg: Check your email for the confirmation link! Please also check your spam folder.
auth.demoInfo: Demo: Create an account first, then check your email (or disable email confirmation in Supabase Dashboard).
auth.signupDescription: Create an account to get started
